nodes.label: AI as research partner for unfamiliar topics
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or limited by knowledge cutoff
nodes.grounding_span: AI helped me here by a) suggesting a topic I probably wouldn't have thought of on my own, and b) handling the heavy lifting

nodes.label: AI efficiency in content production
nodes.label_negative: Manual laborious content creation without AI
nodes.grounding_span: With AI I can produce an entire 12-minute video in a day, but if I had to handle everything myself, it would take weeks

nodes.label: Human creative control over pacing and aesthetics
nodes.label_negative: AI handling of pacing and aesthetics
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to steer the ship more directly when it comes to the visual elements, the pacing of the videos, and the overall channel aesthetics

nodes.label: AI adherence to user instructions
nodes.grounding_span: I've told ChatGPT to stop using dashes in scripts so many times that I've finally stopped requesting it, no matter if it's committed to memory it still does what it wants

nodes.label: AI as tool for audience growth amid displacement
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human jobs and creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI is already taking over in the real world and it will only get worse. The more people who are out of work because of it, the more people who will be seeking fulfillment and looking for deeper meaning to life

nodes.label: Creative efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: With AI I can produce an entire 12-minute video in a day

nodes.label: Artistic integrity and human touch
nodes.grounding_span: AI can simulate art, but I think it will be a while before it's truly able to become an artist

nodes.label: Audience engagement and brand building
nodes.grounding_span: will allow more time for me to handle brand building

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI research assistance
nodes.grounding_span: AI helped me here by a) suggesting a topic I probably wouldn't have thought of on my own, and b) handling the heavy lifting

nodes.label: Frustration with AI ignoring instructions
nodes.grounding_span: I've told ChatGPT to stop using dashes in scripts so many times that I've finally stopped requesting it, no matter if it's committed to memory it still does what it wants

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI production speed
nodes.grounding_span: With AI I can produce an entire 12-minute video in a day

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative control areas
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to steer the ship more directly when it comes to the visual elements, the pacing of the videos, and the overall channel aesthetics

nodes.label: Strategic optimism about AI for brand building
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully as it improves, it will take over the more mundane tasks (like video pacing) and will allow more time for me to handle brand building

nodes.label: Observational learning from others' AI mistakes
nodes.grounding_span: I've seen many other creators take what appears to be a less hands-on approach, and the results are what I use to learn what not to do

nodes.label: Strategic foresight about AI-driven societal shifts
nodes.grounding_span: AI is already taking over in the real world and it will only get worse. The more people who are out of work because of it, the more people who will be seeking fulfillment and looking for deeper meaning to life
